title: Entity (endid)
description: An endid is a thing the substrate knows about — the anchor for claims; it does not itself assert facts. This schema mirrors the entity-table contract the live awen-weave validator enforces (craidd.schema.entity_types.VALID_ENTITY_TYPES + storage/ddl.py entity CHECK, SCHEMA_VERSION v0.1). The nine v0.1 entity types are closed. `place_anchor` and `labels` are constitution/interface-layer optional extensions (interface-contract §2/§4), NOT columns in the v0.1 code entity table — they are omitted by live entities and do not affect round-trip; see compatibility.md.

entity_id.description: Stable entity id (PK), instance-scoped. The code does not constrain its format.

entity_type.description: One of the nine v0.1 controlled entity types (entity_types.py VALID_ENTITY_TYPES / DDL CHECK). street & area have no dedicated seed predicates yet; person is declared but not pre-populated.

uprn.description: OS Unique Property Reference Number (DDL BIGINT). Nullable — most are null until Town Dataset / Lleolydd coverage resolves them.

toid.description: OS MasterMap TopographicArea TOID, where known.

visibility.description: Entity visibility. DDL CHECK (public/restricted/private OR NULL). Only meaningful for `source` entities — validate_entity rejects a non-null visibility on any other type (see cross-rule below).

created_at.description: When the entity was created (DDL DEFAULT NOW()).

place_anchor.description: Constitution/interface-layer OPTIONAL extension — the geographic joint between instances (interface-contract §2/§4). Not a v0.1 code entity column.

labels.description: Constitution/interface-layer OPTIONAL extension: bilingual display labels. Not a v0.1 code entity column — in code, names live as name_cy/name_en claims.

then.description: A non-null visibility is only valid on a source entity (validate_entity).
